name: Jet.AI Inc.
business: Jet.AI Inc. is transitioning from aviation services to an AI data center infrastructure company. It sells fractional jet ownership, jet card memberships, charter bookings via its CharterGPT app, and SaaS software (Reroute AI, DynoFlight) to aircraft operators. It also develops AI data center projects through joint ventures.

exposures.sentence: During 2025, we began executing a strategic transformation to become a pure-play AI data center infrastructure company.
This strategic pivot was driven by significant growth in demand for high-performance computing infrastructure to support artificial intelligence workloads.

catalysts.sentence: The Transactions are subject to various conditions to closing, including the receipt of stockholder approval and are expected to close during the first or second quarter of 2026.

We could lose our entire investment in Sponsor if a business combination is not completed by April 6, 2027 (unless AI Acquisition receives shareholder approval of an extension to the business combination deadline).

catalysts.event: Execution of definitive agreements for Moapa data center
catalysts.sentence: We entered into a non-binding term sheet with respect to the joint venture in December 2025 and currently expect to enter into definitive agreements in the first or second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Delivery of three Citation CJ3 aircraft
catalysts.sentence: The aircraft are currently expected to be delivered in 2027.

catalysts.event: Midwest Project capacity expansion to 100 MW
catalysts.sentence: The Midwest Project currently has 2 megawatts of capacity live and is expected to reach 100 megawatts within 12 months, while the Maritime Project is expected to begin with 40 megawatts and scale to over 1 gigawatt.
